# The Breakup Therapist

> Rose Andre's private therapy practice in Murray, Utah, specializing in breakup and divorce recovery, IFS (Internal Family Systems) therapy, anxious attachment, grief and loss, and LGBTQ+ affirming relationship therapy. Sessions available in-person in Murray, Utah or virtually anywhere in the state.

## Pages
- [Home](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/): Overview, validation of the breakup/divorce experience, services summary, insurance and location info.
- [About & Approach](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/about.html): Rose Andre's background and the IFS (parts-work) lens on why relationship endings are so painful.
- [Services](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/services.html): Individual breakup/divorce therapy, IFS therapy, anxious attachment work, grief and loss therapy, LGBTQ+ affirming therapy, and the upcoming Regulation Library.
  - [Breakup & Divorce Recovery](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/service-breakup-divorce-recovery.html)
  - [IFS Therapy](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/service-ifs-therapy.html)
  - [Anxious Attachment & Relationship Patterns](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/service-anxious-attachment.html)
  - [Grief & Loss Therapy](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/service-grief-loss.html)
  - [LGBTQ+ Affirming Therapy](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/service-lgbtq-affirming.html)
- [Find A Therapist For You](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/find-a-therapist.html): Rose Andre's therapy matchmaker service — a one-hour consultation followed by three tailored therapist recommendations (with a second round and money-back guarantee if no match is found). $100 flat, open to the public, not limited to Rose's own therapy clients. Includes an explainer video.
- [Contact](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/contact.html): Office address, phone, email, contact form, and FAQs.

## Key facts
- Insurance accepted: Select Health, United Healthcare, EMI. Private pay also available.
- Location: 4885 S 900 E, Suite 307, Murray, UT 84117. Virtual sessions available throughout Utah.
- Primary modality: Internal Family Systems (IFS) therapy.
- Therapy Matchmaker service: $100 flat fee, up to six personalized therapist recommendations across two rounds, money-back guarantee if no match is found.
